questions.question: Why can DPO skip training an explicit reward model?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 DPO 可以跳过训练显式的 reward model？
options: DPO trains its own reward model implicitly in a second optimization loop
The closed-form RLHF optimum lets you express reward as a log-ratio of policies, which substitutes into the Bradley-Terry loss
Preference data does not require a scalar reward
Bradley-Terry preferences happen to be invariant to the reward function
options_zh: DPO 会在第二个优化循环中隐式训练自己的 reward model
RLHF 的闭式最优解允许把 reward 表达成两个策略的对数比，再代入 Bradley-Terry loss
偏好数据本身不需要标量 reward
Bradley-Terry 偏好恰好对 reward 函数保持不变

questions.question: What failure mode does IPO (Azar et al., 2024) primarily address in DPO?
questions.question_zh: IPO (Azar 等, 2024) 主要解决 DPO 的哪一类失败模式？
options: Requirement of paired data
Reliance on a reference policy
Length bias of the chosen response
Unbounded implicit reward gap from tiny preference probabilities
options_zh: 必须使用成对数据
依赖参考策略（reference policy）
chosen response 的长度偏好
极小偏好概率导致的、无上界的隐式 reward 差距

questions.question: When would you reach for KTO over DPO?
questions.question_zh: 在什么情况下你会选择 KTO 而不是 DPO？
options: When you must guarantee zero implicit-reward drift
When you have unpaired single labels (desirable / undesirable) and want to use loss-aversion utilities
When you have only paired data with strong margins
When you want to remove the KL penalty entirely
options_zh: 当你必须保证隐式 reward 零漂移时
当你只有非成对的单条标签（desirable / undesirable），并希望使用损失厌恶式效用函数时
当你只有具有强 margin 的成对数据时
当你想完全去掉 KL 惩罚时

questions.question: Which property is unique to SimPO compared to DPO?
questions.question_zh: 相比 DPO，SimPO 独有的特性是什么？
options: It removes the reference policy and normalizes log-likelihood by sequence length
It drops the Bradley-Terry log-sigmoid for an identity mapping
It uses an odds-ratio loss with NLL
It keeps the reference policy and adds a margin
options_zh: 去掉了参考策略，并按序列长度对对数似然做归一化
把 Bradley-Terry 的 log-sigmoid 替换为恒等映射
使用 odds-ratio loss 加 NLL
保留参考策略，并加入一个 margin

questions.question: What is the 'Degraded Chosen Response' problem in DPO that BPO targets?
questions.question_zh: BPO 想要解决的、DPO 中的 "Degraded Chosen Response" 问题指的是什么？
options: The chosen response is missing from the reference policy's support
The chosen response is sampled with low probability at inference
DPO can drive the chosen response's absolute log-prob down as long as the rejected log-prob falls faster
The chosen response becomes longer than the rejected
options_zh: chosen response 不在参考策略的支撑集中
推理时 chosen response 被采到的概率很低
只要 rejected response 的 log-prob 下降更快，DPO 就可能让 chosen response 的绝对 log-prob 也跟着下降
chosen response 变得比 rejected 更长

questions.question: Rafailov et al. (NeurIPS 2024) on scaling laws for direct alignment algorithms show:
questions.question_zh: Rafailov 等人 (NeurIPS 2024) 关于 direct alignment 算法 scaling law 的研究表明：
options: DAAs exhibit the same Gao et al. peak-and-collapse over-optimization shape on gold reward
DAAs eliminate Goodhart by design
Over-optimization disappears when paired data exceeds 100k examples
DPO over-optimizes but IPO and SimPO do not
options_zh: DAA 在 gold reward 上呈现与 Gao 等人相同的 "先升后崩" 过度优化曲线
DAA 在设计上就消除了 Goodhart 问题
成对数据超过 10 万条之后，过度优化就会消失
只有 DPO 会过度优化，IPO 和 SimPO 不会
